case_title: KIM, JAMES et al vs. MARTINEZ, CHRISTOPHER J et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JAMES KIM, SUSAN SERVED SEP-01-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, CHRISTOPHER J
